title: Analyst/Senior Analyst, Customer Marketing (Marketing Analytics)
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or higher in quantitative subject (CS, mathematics, engineering, business, science)
Excellent verbal and written communication in English
2+ years experience in data crunching (consulting, investment banking, PE, strategy, or fast-growing global tech)
Experience in data analysis packages: SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
Experience in visualization tools: Tableau, Power BI
Ability to make decisions on objective evidence
Excellent organizational skills and ability to work independently
bonus_skills: Experience in digital marketing or e-commerce
Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
Skills that foster collaboration and team spirit
matched_skills: 2+ years data experience (4+ years international analytics experience)
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics (digital marketing / ecommerce)
missing_skills: SQL / Python / R / SAS / SPSS (no explicit mention in CV)
Tableau / Power BI (data visualization tools not listed in CV)
core_responsibilities: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding & pricing strategies on partners (Google, Bing, Tripadvisor, Trivago) and adapt based on test results
Analyze large datasets and develop predictive models using data science techniques (e.g. demand elasticity, TV campaign impact modeling)
Build dashboards to track performance, derive insights, and communicate recommendations to stakeholders via presentations
Liaise with product teams on implementation roadmaps based on modeling outputs
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any SQL, Python, or R usage explicitly in CV even if in project/working student context
Emphasize e-commerce analytics experience (ECE Group, Hapag-Lloyd customer journey analysis)
Showcase A/B testing & experiment design prominently as a matched bonus skill
Quantify campaign performance work with specific metrics (CTR, conversion rates, ROI figures)
Lead with data storytelling to C-level as this aligns with Agoda's stakeholder communication culture
Note: role is Bangkok-based with relocation provided — confirm willingness to relocate in application

company_info.size_raw: diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries
